description: Scientific pre-registration v3: gate criteria + estimands + a CLOSED statistical contract + best-static seed policy + G0A cost rule. Operational grids live in synthetic_execution_contract_v1.json. NO real market data. NOT YET EXECUTED.

lineage.reason_for_v3: Prereg v2 (canonical 7e5f1536, file 2607) was mutated in P1.2 with execution parameters (Case 2 diagnosis: no gate criterion changed). Separately, the statistical contract (best-static selection vs evaluation seeds, effect sizes, multiplicity, tie/failed-run rules) was NOT closed in the frozen prereg; closing it is a genuine scientific revision -> v3. Prereg v2 restored to its frozen bytes and marked SUPERSEDED (tag untouched).

seed_blocks.comment: Frozen seeds. paired_causal is split into disjoint SELECTION and EVALUATION seeds so the best-static is never chosen on the realization it is judged against.

outcome_vocabulary.policy: INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST is NOT a top-level verdict; it is verdict=INCONCLUSIVE with reason_code=INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST. NOT_RUN is a suite state (no report written), never a verdict.

statistical_contract.experimental_unit: one seed within the gate's frozen seed block; each seed fixes the structural operator and/or schedule draw for that gate.
statistical_contract.paired_comparison: differences are computed WITHIN a seed (same operator/base snapshots) between the treatment arm and its comparator, then aggregated across seeds.

estimator.surrogate: transverse contraction rate gamma = -(1/(H*dt_eff)) log sigma_max(Phi); Phi is the ordered product of per-step difference maps (exact, no integration noise).
estimator.fhn: tail-mean inter-layer error E12 over the last sync_tail_frac of the run.
estimator.identifiability: precision/recall of past-only active-link recovery; contraction_corr_same_realization.

statistical_contract.test_or_ci: per-seed paired differences over the EVALUATION seed block (8 seeds) -> mean, std, and a bootstrap 95% CI (n_boot=2000, boot_seed=20260713, resampling seeds with replacement). The bootstrap CI, not an underpowered sign test, is the frozen inferential rule (8 evaluation seeds cannot reach sign-test p<0.05).
statistical_contract.decision_rule: band = max(3*pooled_std_across_eval_seeds, min_effect_size_floor). PASS iff mean_paired_diff > band AND bootstrap_ci95_low > 0. FAIL iff mean_paired_diff < -band AND bootstrap_ci95_high < 0. Otherwise INCONCLUSIVE (reason_code=TIE if |mean| <= band).
statistical_contract.tie_rule: TIE (reason_code=TIE) iff |mean paired diff| <= band. Ties are never rounded into PASS.

min_effect_size.note: band = max(3*pooled_std, floor). PASS must clear the band AND have a bootstrap CI excluding 0.

statistical_contract.gate_hierarchy: G1_weak is a precondition for interpreting G1_strict. G2 is interpreted only if G1_weak PASSes. No gate borrows another's data. Comparisons are pre-registered; no post-hoc metric selection.
statistical_contract.multiplicity: few pre-registered comparisons; no correction beyond the pre-registration itself, and no selection among comparators after seeing results.
statistical_contract.failed_run_handling: a seed whose simulation raises or returns non-finite is recorded as FAILED for that gate; if >20% of a gate's seeds fail, the gate verdict is EXECUTION_INVALID (never silently dropped).

best_static_policy.admissible_space: static graphs using exactly N_IL active mirror pairs (same instantaneous edge budget as the switching arms).
best_static_policy.identical_budget: N_IL pairs, held for the full horizon H; same kappa; same operator family.
best_static_policy.optimization_algorithm: argmax of gamma over candidate static subsets = {all K base snapshots} UNION {best_static_search random N_IL-subsets}.
best_static_policy.selection_seeds: seed_blocks.paired_selection ONLY: the winning static SUBSET is chosen to maximize mean gamma across the SELECTION operators.
best_static_policy.evaluation_seeds: seed_blocks.paired_evaluation ONLY (disjoint from selection): the pre-selected subset's gamma and the switching arms' gamma are computed here, and the paired G1_strict contrast is formed here.
best_static_policy.overfitting_prevention: the static subset is FROZEN after the selection phase and never re-chosen on the evaluation operators; selection and evaluation seed sets are disjoint.

g0a_cost_rule.max_cpu_ram_note: single machine, <= all cores, <= 32 GB RAM; if exceeded, stop.
g0a_cost_rule.timeout_rule: on wall-time or resource limit, STOP; write a report with verdict=INCONCLUSIVE, reason_code=INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST, and the list of completed (size, T_swt, seed) cells.
g0a_cost_rule.partial_grid_rule: a partial/incomplete grid may NEVER be interpreted as PASS or FAIL; only INCONCLUSIVE(INCONCLUSIVE_BY_COST).
g0a_cost_rule.checkpoint_rule: checkpoints record ALL completed cells append-only; no cell may be excluded to obtain a favorable verdict; the verdict is computed from the full completed set only.
g0a_cost_rule.no_cost_after_results: the budget above is frozen here and may not be revised after observing any G0A output.

G0A_exact_reproduction.goal: Reproduce the paper regime (sigma_12=0.1) at paper-scale N.
G0A_exact_reproduction.accept: PASS iff fast (T_swt<=25) syncs (frac>=0.5) AND slow (T_swt>=120) does not, across completed cells meeting the cost rule.

G0B_calibrated_demonstration.label: CALIBRATED_QUALITATIVE_DEMONSTRATION (NOT reproduction)
G0B_calibrated_demonstration.accept: DEMONSTRATED(=PASS) iff fast T_swt<=10 syncs AND slow T_swt>=160 does not.
G0B_calibrated_demonstration.forbidden_claim: no N-dependence of the switching threshold without a multi-N switching grid.

G0C_msf_minimal.goal: Minimal transverse Lyapunov, anti-phase channels only.
G0C_msf_minimal.accept: PASS iff fastest T_swt has a Psi<0 region AND the onset depends on T_swt; Psi<0 but no dependence -> INCONCLUSIVE(PARTIAL_NO_TSWT_DEPENDENCE); no Psi<0 -> FAIL; channels not anti-phase -> EXECUTION_INVALID(PREREQ_FAIL).

G1_weak.goal: Switching beats static-sparse of equal instantaneous density.
G1_weak.accept: PASS iff mean paired diff > min_effect_size AND paired test p<0.05; TIE within band; else FAIL

G1_strict.goal: Switching beats the average graph AND the best admissible static (same budget).
G1_strict.estimand: best_switch_gamma - max(gamma_average, gamma_best_static) (paired, evaluation seeds; best_static selected on selection seeds)
G1_strict.accept: PASS iff mean paired diff > min_effect_size AND p<0.05; TIE within band; else FAIL
G1_strict.prior: the fast arm is NOT expected to beat the average (averaging theory); any advantage is expected at intermediate rates (Zhang-Strogatz) -> separate branch.

G2_order.goal: Temporal order changes contraction beyond rate/density/average.
G2_order.estimand: |gamma_ordered - gamma_shuffled_order| at intermediate rate (paired) and the non-constant shuffled_dwell null
G2_order.accept: PASS iff order effect > min_effect_size AND p<0.05; else INCONCLUSIVE with reason_code=TIE (evidence favors aggregate connectivity)

G3_robustness.goal: Robustness of the G1_weak advantage to IMPLEMENTED stresses only.
G3_robustness.accept: PASS iff faithful & mild-heterogeneity advantage>0 with p<0.05; else INCONCLUSIVE(LIMITED); signed stage with no negative weight -> EXECUTION_INVALID(STRESS_NOT_IMPLEMENTED)

G4_identifiability.goal: Recover switching from observations, past-only, same-realization ground truth.
G4_identifiability.accept: PASS iff precision>0.6 AND recall>0.6 AND contraction_corr>0.5 AND basis estimator beats the factor-confounded one; else FAIL
G4_identifiability.async_language: asynchrony/LOCF (Epps-like) degradation, NOT a causal Epps demonstration

removed_gates.H3: coverage-vs-reachability isolation removed (confounds >1 variable); temporal_reachability_ratio reported as a descriptor only.

reporting_requirements.atomicity: atomic write, refuse overwrite and stale .tmp, *_v2.json names, no silent H//dwell+1, log any capped/dropped coverage.
